child of chaos.desc: The Wayward Heir lends your attacks a 10% chance to deliver a random battlerage affliction to your target.
child of chaos.flavour: I have absolutely no idea whether this will help. Isn't that exciting?

truther.desc: You are immune to the paranoia and hallucinations afflictions.

corrupted lineage.desc: You may now select boons from any race, not solely those of your own race.

temporal anomaly.desc: Proc-based effect with a 5 second cooldown.

fae-lapse.desc: Proc-based effect with a 5 second cooldown.

cleave.desc: An AoE strike. Fails if only one denizen is present.

reckless rage.desc: Prevents blood shields and regular shields.
